series_metadata.series_title: Applications: Disabled Parking Plates or Placards
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents applications for disabled parking plates or placards and agency actions in response to those applications. This series includes, but is not limited to: applications (MED-10 and MED-11), approvals, disapprovals, medical certifications, correspondence, and other supporting documentation. COV 46.2-731

This series documents applications for sun-shading or tinting films and agency actions in response to those applications. The series includes, but is not limited to: applications, medical authorization (MED-20), removal certification (MED-21), medical certifications, correspondence, and other supporting documentation

retention_rules.trigger_event: equipment, facility, or property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the identity and personal information of citizens and businesses that request DMV vehicle information prior to purchasing vehicles. Request histories are retained for use by agency investigators, state and local law enforcement and the FBI to investigate auto theft and title fraud activity. This series includes, but is not limited to, applications (CRD 1) and other supporting documentation.
